chapter_title.en: Chapter 38 – The omission in the two first Rak’at

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/191)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/191)
text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) الْإِعَادَةُ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ الْأَوَّلَتَيْنِ وَ السَّهْوُ فِي الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ الْأَخِيرَتَيْنِ.

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahman Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Washa, and Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Washa who said,
‘Abu Al-Hassan Al-Rezaasws said: ‘The repeating is regarding the first two Rak’at, and the omission is (allowed) during the last two Rak’at’ (i.e. no need to repeat).
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Washsha’ and al-Husayn ibn Muhammad from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Washsha’ who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, al-Rida, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once said to me, ‘In the first two Rak‘at it is performing again and confusion in the second two Rak‘at (has remedies).”’
